# BMarko Structures

**Category:** Modular / Prefabricated, Containerized Data Centers, Edge and Micro Data Centers
**Website:** https://bmarkostructures.com/modular-data-centers/

## Headline
Containerized and prefabricated structure provider relevant to fast-turn modular and edge data center deployments.

## Overview
BMarko Structures is useful in categories where the physical structure and deployment shell matter as much as the internal IT stack. The company gives the market map a more concrete containerized and prefabricated building-systems angle, especially for rapid deployment and edge use cases.

## Key capabilities
- containerized deployment structures
- prefabricated building systems
- rapid modular delivery support

## Best fit for
- buyers evaluating transportable or containerized footprints
- edge and regional deployment teams
- projects where structural speed and packaging are central
